scripts.db:setup: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { Client } = require('pg'); const schema = fs.readFileSync('src/schema.sql', 'utf8'); const client = new Client({ host: 'localhost', port: 5432, database: 'keepsafe', user: 'postgres', password: 'postgres' }); client.connect().then(() => client.query(schema)).then(() => { console.log('Database setup complete'); client.end(); }).catch(console.error);"
